top_signals.title: Gulf trade deal: Britain should learn from the success of Dubai
top_signals.summary: The Gulf Cooperation Council is a model of post-Brexit success success, says James Price In 211BC, when Hannibal was camped outside the walls of Rome, Livy tells us that the ground his army occupied came up for auction in the city. Such was Rome’s confidence in its own future that it sold for full price. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
